title: Heartwarming gesture brightens Good Friday for hospital patients
description: GEORGE NEWS - Smiley Ghezali and his...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Smiley Ghezali and his dedicated team of barbers and hairdressers from The Garden Route Barbers performed a selfless act of kindness on Good Friday, 29 March.


> In a heartwarming display of community spirit, The Garden Route Barbers visited George Hospital today, offering complimentary haircuts to our patients.


Their generosity brought smiles and joy to adults and children spending their time in the hospital during this significant time of year. In total, Smiley and his team provided a record 52 haircuts to patients.

"We are deeply moved by the generosity and thoughtfulness of Smiley Ghezali and The Garden Route Barbers," said Michael Vonk, CEO of George Hospital.

"Their gesture not only enhances the physical well-being of our patients but also uplifts their spirits during what can be a challenging time. It's acts like these that remind us of the power of compassion and community."

The impact of their visit resonated throughout the hospital, spreading warmth and positivity among patients, staff, and visitors alike. This gesture embodies the true essence of the season, fostering a sense of togetherness and compassion within our community.


> George Hospital extends its sincere thanks to Smiley Ghezali and The Garden Route Barbers for their unwavering support and generosity.


Their kindness has made a lasting impression, reminding us all of the importance of giving back and caring for one another.One of the children the team visited.

Smiley and his team provided a record 52 haircuts to patients.  One of the patients being treated to a wash. ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
